title: Argentinian Stir-Fried Empanadas
description: A twist on traditional empanadas, these Argentinian-style stir-fried empanadas are filled with fermented and chewy ingredients for a unique flavor and texture.
instructions: Preheat a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil to the skillet and swirl it around to coat the bottom.
Add the diced tomatoes and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, or until they start to soften.
Add the chewy filling and stir-fry for another 2-3 minutes, or until it's lightly browned.
Add the fermented empanada dough and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes, or until it's lightly browned and crispy.
Add the Argentinian stir-fry sauce and stir-fry for another minute, or until everything is coated in the sauce.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve the empanadas hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
